name: rubber-duck-for-codex
description: Rubber-ducking skills with focused dialogue orchestration and independent quality review.

interface.shortDescription: Checkpoint Codex reasoning with a quality partner.
interface.longDescription: Rubber Duck For Codex adds two focused skills: one orchestrates open, checkpoint, and close dialogue during non-trivial turns, while the independent partner checks drafts, decisions, evidence, drift, user-request fulfillment, solution convergence, and unsupported fallbacks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use rubber-ducking to pressure-test this turn.
